title: Signalis Mod
description: This mod adds Replikas from the survival horror game Signalis to your Minecraft world. Fight corrupted variants or craft your own Replika squad.
body:
# Overview:
This mod adds Replikas from the hit survival horror game Signalis to your Minecraft world! Craft iconic weapons, fight corrupted variants, and assemble your own team of Replikas. Includes blocks, items and entities inspired by Signalis. Currently in early development, more to come soon.

# In this Mod:
- Two Replika entities, Storch and Eule as well as their player crafted varients. Naturally spawned units are loyal to the Eusan Nation and protect eachother as a group, while units spawned by players are loyal to that player and will fight alongside them.
![Storch next to the player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5de980a2cf04b20e54ca69b9072693a7bd419bbf.png)
- The AEON Orders item can be used to command your Replikas. Right click to toggle follow and shift click to toggle stay.
- Corrupted Replikas are agressive varients overtaken by the flesh infection. They seek to attack and assilimate other Replikas to the corruption. Corrupted Storch is added by this mod.
![Corrupted Storch with zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1712dea3daf676a1e667bf4a1fe4bbe682404ee5.png)
- Defeating corrupted Replikas will grant shell shards used to craft your own Replika units.
- A new structure, the Corrupted Outpost, can appear in the overworld. Corrupted Replikas will spawn at this location, making it a dangerous but useful source of resources. 
- Two new block types, flesh blocks and facility plating varients, allow you to make Sierpinski-themed builds.
![Eule and Storch with new blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/665201f23f5b8eb680fef3ee7b187cf0c03c8fc0.png)
- All main wepons from Signalis, including the Nitro Express Rifle. Craft firearms and amunition to combat hostile mobs or the corruption.
![Signalis weapons Minecraft models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af008d9b3f734377e4bf9c9effd2f4920d8687e1.png)
